name: ReActions
description: Markdown-defined, executable recipes for coding agents.

reactions.name: Verified Async CTA Button Green
reactions.summary: Adds a verified async CTA button with a green default preset, explicit style overrides, accessibility requirements, loading state, success feedback, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Destructive Confirm Button Red
reactions.summary: Adds a verified destructive action button with a red default preset, mandatory confirmation flow, cancel path, async loading state, success feedback, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Copy Button Neutral
reactions.summary: Adds a verified copy button with a neutral default preset, clipboard behavior, copied feedback, failure handling, accessibility requirements, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Icon Button Neutral
reactions.summary: Adds a verified icon button with a neutral default preset, accessible labeling, keyboard support, disabled state, optional tooltip/feedback, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Toggle Button Green
reactions.summary: Adds a verified toggle button with a green active preset, neutral inactive state, aria-pressed semantics, visible on/off states, keyboard support, optional persistence, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Secondary Button Neutral
reactions.summary: Adds a verified secondary action button with a neutral default preset, lower visual emphasis than primary actions, correct button/link semantics, accessibility requirements, disabled state, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Floating Action Button Green
reactions.summary: Adds a verified floating action button with a green default preset, safe fixed/floating placement, accessible label, optional icon/label behavior, responsive layout rules, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Verified Split Button Menu
reactions.summary: Adds a verified split button with a primary action, secondary menu actions, accessible menu behavior, keyboard support, open/close state, optional async primary action, and browser verification.

reactions.name: Check Vercel Analytics
reactions.summary: Checks Vercel Web Analytics for a project and date range using CLI-only read-only commands or a local analytics adapter, then produces a consistent analytics report.

reactions.name: Check Vercel Usage
reactions.summary: Checks Vercel billing/resource usage for a date range using the official Vercel CLI, then produces a consistent read-only usage and cost report.

reactions.name: Check Vercel Deployment Status
reactions.summary: Checks recent Vercel deployment status using CLI-only read-only commands, then produces a consistent deployment health report.
